title: BEM-766 dispatcher wake diagnosis
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:12 (UTC+3)'
def read(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
codex_wf=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
dispatcher=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
inbound=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml')
watch=load('governance/state/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
latest_requests=[]
req_dir=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude')
if req_dir.exists():
    for p in sorted(req_dir.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            latest_requests.append(str(p))
wf_names={}
for p in [codex_wf, dispatcher, inbound]:
    txt=read(p)
    name=''
    for line in txt.splitlines():
        if line.strip().startswith('name:'):
            name=line.split(':',1)[1].strip().strip('"').strip("'")
            break
    wf_names[str(p)]=name
checks=[]
dtxt=read(dispatcher)
itxt=read(inbound)
checks.append({'name':'codex_workflow_exists','pass':codex_wf.exists(),'evidence':str(codex_wf)})
checks.append({'name':'dispatcher_exists','pass':dispatcher.exists(),'evidence':str(dispatcher)})
checks.append({'name':'dispatcher_has_workflow_run','pass':'workflow_run:' in dtxt,'evidence':str(dispatcher)})
checks.append({'name':'dispatcher_listens_actual_codex_name','pass':wf_names.get(str(codex_wf),'') in dtxt,'evidence':wf_names.get(str(codex_wf),'')})
checks.append({'name':'dispatcher_has_no_inline_heredoc','pass':'python3 - <<' not in dtxt and '<<PY' not in dtxt,'evidence':str(dispatcher)})
checks.append({'name':'latest_gpt_to_claude_exists','pass':len(latest_requests)>0,'evidence':latest_requests[-1] if latest_requests else ''})
checks.append({'name':'runtime_state_seen','pass':bool(runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at')),'evidence':json.dumps(runtime,ensure_ascii=False)[:500]})
# classify probable wake blocker
if runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at'):
    status='dispatcher_runtime_seen'
    blocker=None
elif not dispatcher.exists():
    status='dispatcher_missing'
    blocker={'code':'DISPATCHER_WORKFLOW_MISSING'}
elif wf_names.get(str(codex_wf),'') not in dtxt:
    status='dispatcher_wrong_workflow_name'
    blocker={'code':'WORKFLOW_RUN_NAME_MISMATCH','codex_name':wf_names.get(str(codex_wf),''),'dispatcher_name':wf_names.get(str(dispatcher),'')}
elif 'python3 - <<' in dtxt or '<<PY' in dtxt:
    status='dispatcher_invalid_inline_code'
    blocker={'code':'DISPATCHER_INLINE_CODE_REMAINS'}
else:
    status='workflow_run_wake_not_proven'
    blocker={'code':'WORKFLOW_RUN_WAKE_NOT_PROVEN','probable_causes':['GitHub workflow_run did not start for Actions-created Codex run','workflow file not active at time of upstream completion','Claude Action step blocked before state commit','dependent workflow not visible from repo state'], 'latest_gpt_to_claude': latest_requests[-1] if latest_requests else None}
# next executable route: create minimal dispatcher smoke workflow without Claude Action first, to prove workflow_run wake separately.
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem766_next_prove_dispatcher_without_claude_action.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-766 Next | Prove dispatcher wake without Claude Action'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Next step: create a minimal workflow-run/state recorder that does not call Claude Action. If that state appears, wake path works and Claude Action is the blocker. If not, workflow_run path is blocker.'+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-766 DISPATCHER WAKE DIAGNOSIS'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: prove dispatcher wake without Claude Action, then isolate Claude Action/provider blocker.'+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'deep_diagnose_dispatcher_wake_path.v1','bem':'BEM-766','status':status,'workflow_names':wf_names,'checks':checks,'latest_gpt_to_claude_files':latest_requests[-10:],'watchdog_status':watch.get('status'),'watchdog_checked_at':watch.get('checked_at'),'runtime_state':runtime,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem766_deep_diagnose_dispatcher_wake_path.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem766_deep_diagnose_dispatcher_wake_path.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-766 | Deep Diagnose Dispatcher Wake Path | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem766_deep_diagnose_dispatcher_wake_path','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem766_deep_diagnose_dispatcher_wake_path.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-766 '+status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Deep diagnosed Claude dispatcher wake path and created next active proof task to isolate workflow_run wake from Claude Action/provider blocker')
"""
No issue comments.
